name: Trending Digest

releases.author: alex-de-kora
releases.description:
## 🌊 Trending Digest v1.0.0

### Features
- 25+ sources (GitHub, HN, Zhihu, Medium, Twitter/X, arXiv, etc.)
- AI scoring with Claude-compatible API
- 20+ focus areas for content filtering
- Daily auto-write to vault
- Incremental merging (no content loss on re-run)
- Scheduled + manual trigger
- Bilingual support (English & Chinese)

### Installation
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`
2. Put them in `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/trending-digest/`
3. Restart Obsidian and enable the plugin
releases.name: v1.0.0 — Initial Release
